description: Crafted from leather, this textured black wallet from turtle is fabulously stylish and well organized. This two-fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday useDimensions: 11.5 cm X 9 cmHas one concealed compartment on the outside with a snap button flap that has a credit card organizer Has one main compartment on the inside with fabric liningFour credit card slots on the right side One compartments on the right for coins with a snap button flapConcealed chambers on the left and right sidesCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
